mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cpf_cache_refresh_event ( cache_name, event_type, event_key, source_was_id, published_by, published_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{cacheName}, #{eventType}, #{eventKey}, #{sourceWasId}, #{publishedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), #{publishedBy}, #{publishedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_id AS eventId, cache_name AS cacheName, event_type AS eventType, event_key AS eventKey, source_was_id AS sourceWasId, published_by AS publishedBy, published_at AS publishedAt FROM cpf_cache_refresh_event WHERE event_id > #{lastEventId} ORDER BY event_id
